scripts.build:ios:preview: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.build:ios:production: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:ios:simulator: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest build --platform ios --profile simulator
scripts.submit:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli@latest submit --platform ios --profile production
